coverage_model: 9 execution layers mapped to 7 buyer-facing boardroom pillars and guarded by 10/12-gate validation.

execution_layers.label: Official/register identity
execution_layers.public_rule: Show legal/operating identity only at the evidence level supported by current source envelopes.
execution_layers.official_close_route: Current registry/provider extract with source hash.

execution_layers.label: Finance waterfall
execution_layers.public_rule: Show growth/finance context, but no hard revenue or margin claim without primary/provider document bytes.
execution_layers.official_close_route: KvK financial statements, XBRL/PDF filing, or licensed provider extract.

execution_layers.label: Sanctions, PEP and adverse media
execution_layers.public_rule: No-hit is a guarded triage signal, never a legal clearance warranty.
execution_layers.official_close_route: Rerun on confirmed legal name, directors, UBOs and aliases.

execution_layers.label: Public web OSINT
execution_layers.public_rule: Promote concrete target-owned findings; label marketing claims as context until corroborated.
execution_layers.official_close_route: Archived source copy plus management/seller confirmation for operating KPIs.

execution_layers.label: Social and sentiment intelligence
execution_layers.public_rule: Only source-enveloped professional/social URLs are promoted; raw username hits stay internal.
execution_layers.official_close_route: Repeatable social/sentiment run with promoted source list and timestamp.

execution_layers.label: Cyber and digital footprint
execution_layers.public_rule: Do not score provider/CDN exposure as target-owned risk until asset attribution is proven.
execution_layers.official_close_route: Asset owner confirmation, DNS/TLS/MX/subdomain scan and breach exposure check.

execution_layers.label: Reverse media, dorking and guarded shadow
execution_layers.public_rule: Treat as discovery/provenance routes unless exact-entity corroboration is present.
execution_layers.official_close_route: Two independent exact-entity sources or primary target/provider document.

execution_layers.label: Elite multi-model deep research
execution_layers.public_rule: Model output can enrich, challenge and prioritize, but every promoted finding needs a source envelope.
execution_layers.official_close_route: Provider status, source URLs, anti-hallucination gates and findings artifact.

execution_layers.label: Guarded local/Xortron synthesis
execution_layers.public_rule: Local synthesis is analysis of verified evidence, not primary proof.
execution_layers.official_close_route: Attach verified evidence bundle, gate report and reproducible run log.

public_report_rule: Public HTML may summarize status and findings, but raw provider errors, rate-limit text and unverified social hits stay in artifacts.
